title: Best Time to Visit Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Best overall months:** May, June, and September — warm, manageable crowds, and perfect for walking.
**Cheapest time:** November through February. Hotels are at their lowest and you'll have museums to yourself.
**Peak season:** July and August. Long days but higher prices, bigger crowds, and occasional 35°C heatwaves.
**Christmas markets:** Late November through December 23rd. Gendarmenmarkt is the standout.
Our free walking tour runs **year-round** — rain, shine, or snow. **Book at berlinwalk.com.**
